title: MATANA 20 Premium White Plastic Bowls with Silver Rim, 360ml - Elegant, Sturdy & Reusable - Soup & Dessert Bowls for Weddings, Birthdays, BBQ, Buffets, Catering, Parties
features: Elegant and Versatile: Elevate your dining experience with our 20 premium white plastic bowls featuring a stylish silver rim. Perfect for serving appetizers, soups, salads, desserts, and more at any occasion.
Durable and Reusable: Crafted from high-quality BPA-free plastic, these bowls are sturdy enough to withstand multiple uses, making them an eco-friendly choice for your gatherings.
Easy to Clean: While handwashing is recommended to maintain the elegant silver rim, these bowls are also dishwasher safe, ensuring easy and convenient cleanup after your events.
Perfect for All Occasions: Whether it's a wedding, birthday party, picnic, barbecue, or holiday celebration like Christmas, these bowls add a touch of sophistication to any event.
Generous Capacity: With a 360 ml capacity, these bowls are ideal for serving a variety of dishes, from soups and salads to desserts and dips, ensuring your guests are always satisfied.
description: Introducing our Premium White Plastic Bowls with Silver Rim, a perfect blend of elegance and practicality for any occasion. This set of 20 high-quality bowls is designed to elevate your dining experience, whether you're hosting a lavish wedding, a cozy birthday party, or a festive holiday celebration. Each bowl features a stylish silver rim, adding a touch of sophistication to your table setting. With a generous 360 ml capacity, these bowls are perfect for serving appetizers, soups, salads, desserts, and more. Their versatile design makes them ideal for any event, from weddings and birthday parties to picnics, barbecues, and Christmas gatherings. Made from premium BPA-free plastic, our bowls are built to last. Their sturdy construction ensures they can be reused multiple times, making them an eco-friendly choice for your parties and events. Enjoy the convenience of disposable bowls without compromising on quality and style. For your convenience, our bowls are dishwasher safe, allowing for quick and easy cleanup after your event. To preserve the elegant silver rim, we recommend handwashing. This way, your bowls will continue to look pristine and ready for your next celebration. Whether you're serving appetizers, starters, salads, soups, dips, side dishes, desserts, ice cream, puddings, or fruit, these bowls are the perfect choice. Their sleek design and premium quality make them suitable for any occasion, adding a touch of class to your dining experience.
